metadata.description: Tune Claude Code's own configuration. A home for skills that write and audit Claude Code's config files against the official docs — claude-md-writer for CLAUDE.md / .claude/rules/ memory, and a usage statusline.

plugins.name: cc-tuner
plugins.description: Audit CLAUDE.md / .claude/rules/ memory against the official docs (claude-md-writer), and install a rate-limit + context usage statusline (/cc-tuner:statusline-setup).
